q: How to detect 'Quiet Quitting' in middle management
diagnostic: Quiet quitting is invisible to standard HR metrics. It shows up as decreased initiative, risk-avoidance, and 'safe' decisions. The People Strategist agent analyzes communication patterns and decision quality to detect disengagement before it spreads.

description: Intent–action gap — the board agrees on strategy, but engineering and sales execute something completely different.
symptom: Shadow projects discovered months in. Sales promises features engineering deprecated. Resources wasted on conflicting roadmaps.
